---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Erling"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


# Paper 2 Born under crisis

long term demographic effects of beeing born effects

- Livslängd efter födsel runt kriget
- andelen oäkta
- Dödfödda
- får man lyte?
- Bonde?
- Egen fertilitet

Data


```{r}
## ===== Create ../data/boende.Rdata (full pipeline, no row drops) =====

## Packages
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(anytime) 
library(sp)
```

```{r}


## ---------- READ BASE (U21008) ----------
# individ_orginal <- fread("~/Arkiv/Data/U21008-Leverans/u21008_fil01_individ.txt")
individ <- fread("~/gitstuff/POPUM_DDB/POPUM_person.csv")
names(individ)
# names(individ_orginal)
```

```{r}

individ$FODHEMFRSNMN <- trimws(individ$FODHEMFRSNMN)
# boende <- fread("~/gitstuff/POPUM_DDB/POPUM_BOENDE.csv")
# BOFRS <- fread("~/gitstuff/POPUM_DDB/POPUM_BOFRS.csv")
# BOORT <- fread("~/gitstuff/POPUM_DDB/POPUM_BOORT.csv")
boende <- fread("~/gitstuff/POPUM_DDB/POPUM_BOFRSORT.csv")

## För att skapa något som boende_orginal merga BOORT och BOFRS
## finns det överlapp i tidsperioder för individer i BOFRS

# boende_orginal  <- fread("~/Arkiv/Data/U21008-Leverans/u21008_fil02_boende.txt")
# boende_orginal[, V12 := NULL]
```
```{r}
## Här ersätts boendeorginal med 
```


```{r}
# # library(data.table)
# 
# ## ---- helper: normalize YYYYMMDD to numeric YYYYMMDD (integer) without Date types
# normalize_yyyymmdd_num <- function(v, end_of_range = FALSE) {
#   # Accept integer/character, return integer like 18950315L
#   x <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(v))
#   x[is.na(x) | x == 0L] <- NA_integer_
# 
#   y <- x %/% 10000L                   # year
#   md <- x %% 10000L
#   m <- md %/% 100L                    # month
#   d <- md %% 100L                     # day
# 
#   # missing month+day (....0000)
#   both_missing <- !is.na(x) & (md == 0L)
#   if (any(both_missing)) {
#     m[both_missing] <- ifelse(end_of_range, 12L, 1L)
#     d[both_missing] <- ifelse(end_of_range, 31L, 1L)
#   }
# 
#   # missing day only (....MM00)
#   day_missing <- !is.na(x) & (d == 0L) & (m != 0L)
#   if (any(day_missing)) {
#     if (end_of_range) {
#       yy <- y[day_missing]; mm <- m[day_missing]
#       # last day of month (numeric, handles leap years)
#       last_day <- function(yy, mm) {
#         if (mm %in% c(1L,3L,5L,7L,8L,10L,12L)) return(31L)
#         if (mm %in% c(4L,6L,9L,11L))           return(30L)
#         # February:
#         leap <- (yy %% 400L == 0L) | ((yy %% 4L == 0L) & (yy %% 100L != 0L))
#         ifelse(leap, 29L, 28L)
#       }
#       d[day_missing] <- last_day(yy, mm)
#     } else {
#       d[day_missing] <- 1L
#     }
#   }
# 
#   # Recompose; if year is NA, keep NA
#   out <- ifelse(is.na(y), NA_integer_, y * 10000L + m * 100L + d)
#   as.integer(out)
# }
# 
# ## ---- copies
# FRS <- copy(BOFRS)   # has DDBID, BOBDAT (period start)
# ORT <- copy(BOORT)   # has DDBID, BOBDAT (events to place)
# 
# ## ---- ensure same ID type
# for (DT in list(FRS, ORT)) {
#   if ("DDBID" %in% names(DT)) DT[, DDBID := as.character(DDBID)]
# }
# 
# ## ---- build numeric bounds in FRS
# FRS[, start_num := normalize_yyyymmdd_num(BOBDAT, end_of_range = FALSE)]
# setorder(FRS, DDBID, start_num, na.last = TRUE)
# FRS[, next_start_num := shift(start_num, type = "lead"), by = DDBID]
# FRS[is.na(next_start_num), next_start_num := 99991231L]  # open-ended upper limit
# 
# ## (optional) if you prefer using explicit BOSDAT as upper bound, uncomment:
# # FRS[, end_num := normalize_yyyymmdd_num(BOSDAT, end_of_range = TRUE)]
# # FRS[, upper_num := fifelse(!is.na(end_num), pmin(end_num, next_start_num - 1L), next_start_num - 1L)]
# # FRS[, end_num := NULL]  # keep upper_num as final upper bound
# # setnames(FRS, "upper_num", "next_start_num")
# 
# ## ---- event date in ORT
# ORT[, event_num := normalize_yyyymmdd_num(BOBDAT, end_of_range = FALSE)]
# 
# ## ---- non-equi join: start_num <= event_num < next_start_num
# setkey(FRS, DDBID, start_num, next_start_num)
# merged <- FRS[
#   ORT,
#   on = .(DDBID, start_num <= event_num, next_start_num > event_num),
#   nomatch = 0L
# ]
# 
# ## tidy col names from i=ORT side (optional)
# setnames(merged,
#          old = c("i.BOBDAT", "event_num"),
#          new = c("BOBDAT_ORT_raw", "BOBDAT_ORT_num"),
#          skip_absent = TRUE)
# 
# # 'merged' now has each BOORT record matched to the BOFRS spell
# # where its numeric BOBDAT falls: start_num <= BOBDAT_ORT_num < next_start_num

```
```{r}
## kontroll  var hör 199896223 hemma?
# table(merged[merged$BOORTNMN == "VILLVATTNET"]$BOORTNMN, merged[merged$BOORTNMN == "VILLVATTNET"]$BOFRSNMN )
# table(merged[merged$BOORTNMN == "LJUSVATTNET"]$BOORTNMN, merged[merged$BOORTNMN == "LJUSVATTNET"]$BOFRSNMN )
# merged[merged$BOORTNMN == "LJUSVATTNET" & merged$BOFRSNMN == "SKELLEFTEÅ"]
# 
# table(merged$BOREGPREFIX)
```

```{r}
# ## ---------- READ COMPLEMENT (U24002) for individ + boende ----------
# individ24 <- fread("~/Arkiv/Data/DDB/U24002/u24002_file01_person.txt")
# individ24[, UTTAGSID_new := paste0(REGPREFIX, UTTAGSID)]
# uttagsidkey <- individ24[, .(UTTAGSID, UTTAGSID_new)]
# individ24[, UTTAGSID := UTTAGSID_new][, UTTAGSID_new := NULL]
# individ24$FODHEMFRSNMN <- trimws(individ24$FODHEMFRSNMN)
# 
# boende24 <- fread("~/Arkiv/Data/DDB/U24002/u24002_file02_bofrsort.txt")
# boende24 <- merge(boende24, uttagsidkey, by = "UTTAGSID", all.x = TRUE)
# boende24[, UTTAGSID := UTTAGSID_new][, UTTAGSID_new := NULL]
# boende24[, V12 := NULL]
# 
# ## ---------- OPTIONAL CLEAN to avoid merge overlap exactly as your notes ----------
# individ <- individ[REGPREFIX != "NIL"]
# 
# ## ---------- COMBINE ----------
# individ <- rbindlist(list(individ, individ24), fill = TRUE)
# boende  <- rbindlist(list(boende,  boende24 ), fill = TRUE)
# 
# ## ---------- STANDARDIZE ID TYPE (avoid join type mismatches) ----------
# if ("UTTAGSID" %in% names(individ)) individ[, UTTAGSID := as.character(UTTAGSID)]
# if ("UTTAGSID" %in% names(boende))  boende[,  UTTAGSID := as.character(UTTAGSID)]

```
```{r}
## ---------- WGS84 COORDINATES ----------


KODORTKOD <- fread("/home/erling/gitstuff/POPUM_DDB/POPUM_KODORTKOD.csv")

SWEREF99toWGS84 <- function(coords) {
  coords$id <- seq_len(nrow(coords))
  coords_org <- coords
  coords <- na.omit(coords)
  tmp <- data.frame(coords.x = coords$X_ORT, coords.y = coords$Y_ORT)
  coordinates(tmp) <- ~ coords.x + coords.y
  proj4string(tmp) <- CRS("+init=epsg:3021")
  coords.WGS84 <- spTransform(tmp, CRS("+init=epsg:4326"))
  coords.WGS84 <- data.frame(lat = coords.WGS84@coords[,1],
                             lon = coords.WGS84@coords[,2],
                             id  = coords$id)
  merge(coords_org, coords.WGS84, by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
}

coords_in  <- as.data.frame(KODORTKOD[, .(X_ORT, Y_ORT)])
coords_out <- SWEREF99toWGS84(coords_in)[, c("lat","lon")]
KODORTKOD  <- cbind(KODORTKOD, coords_out)
KODORTKOD[, c("X_ORT","Y_ORT") := NULL]

## Merge coords onto boende using ORTKOD == BOORTKOD
boende[, ORTKOD := BOORTKOD]
boende <- KODORTKOD[, .(ORTKOD, ORTNMN, lat, lon)][boende, on = "ORTKOD"]
boende[, c("ORTKOD","ORTNMN") := NULL]
```
```{r}
## ---------- ADD PERSON VARS (sex + birth/death) ----------
# boende <- individ[, .(UTTAGSID, KON, FODDAT, DODDAT)][boende, on = "UTTAGSID"]
boende <- individ[, .(DDBID, KON, FODDAT, DODDAT)][boende, on = "DDBID"]

## Normalize FODDAT/DODDAT (fill missing month/day); keep rows; silence warnings
boende[, FODDAT := as.character(FODDAT)]
boende[, DODDAT := as.character(DODDAT)]

boende[, FODDAT := ifelse(substr(FODDAT, 5, 8) == "0000",
                          paste0(substr(FODDAT, 1, 4), "0101"), FODDAT)]
boende[, DODDAT := ifelse(substr(DODDAT, 5, 8) == "0000",
                          paste0(substr(DODDAT, 1, 4), "1231"), DODDAT)]
boende[, FODDAT := ifelse(substr(FODDAT, 7, 8) == "00",
                          paste0(substr(FODDAT, 1, 6), "01"), FODDAT)]
boende[, DODDAT := ifelse(substr(DODDAT, 7, 8) == "00",
                          paste0(substr(DODDAT, 1, 6), "30"), DODDAT)]

boende[, FODDAT := fifelse(FODDAT == "0", NA_character_, FODDAT)]
boende[, DODDAT := fifelse(DODDAT == "0", NA_character_, DODDAT)]

boende[, FOD_DATE := suppressWarnings(anydate(FODDAT))]
boende[, DOD_DATE := suppressWarnings(anydate(DODDAT))]

```
```{r}

## ---------- NORMALIZE RESIDENCE INTERVAL DATES ----------
boende[, BOBDAT := as.character(BOBDAT)]
boende[, BOSDAT := as.character(BOSDAT)]

boende[, BOBDAT := ifelse(substr(BOBDAT, 5, 8) == "0000",
                          paste0(substr(BOBDAT, 1, 4), "0101"), BOBDAT)]
boende[, BOSDAT := ifelse(substr(BOSDAT, 5, 8) == "0000",
                          paste0(substr(BOSDAT, 1, 4), "1231"), BOSDAT)]
boende[, BOBDAT := ifelse(substr(BOBDAT, 7, 8) == "00",
                          paste0(substr(BOBDAT, 1, 6), "01"), BOBDAT)]
boende[, BOSDAT := ifelse(substr(BOSDAT, 7, 8) == "00",
                          paste0(substr(BOSDAT, 1, 6), "30"), BOSDAT)]

boende[, BOB_DATE := suppressWarnings(anydate(BOBDAT))]
boende[, BOS_DATE := suppressWarnings(anydate(BOSDAT))]
# setkey(boende, UTTAGSID, BONR)
setkey(boende, DDBID, BONR)

## ---------- FIX OVERLAPS (no row drops) ----------
# boende[, nyobs      := UTTAGSID == shift(UTTAGSID, 1L, type = "lag")]
boende[, nyobs      := DDBID == shift(DDBID, 1L, type = "lag")]
boende[, problemdat := BOB_DATE <  shift(BOS_DATE, 1L, type = "lag")]
boende[, nystart    := shift(BOS_DATE, 1L, type = "lag")]

boende[, BOB_DATE := as.Date(
  ifelse(nyobs & problemdat, nystart, BOB_DATE),
  origin = "1970-01-01"
)]
## Ensure first row is valid
boende[1, BOB_DATE := suppressWarnings(anydate(BOBDAT[1]))]

boende[, c("nyobs","problemdat","nystart") := NULL]
```

```{r}


## ---------- ADD FIRST HISCOSTATUS==13 NOTE (poverty) ----------
# yrke <- fread("~/Arkiv/Data/U21008-Leverans/u21008_fil06_yrke.txt")
yrke <- fread("/home/erling/gitstuff/POPUM_DDB/POPUM_YRKE.csv")

## standardize id type here too
# if ("UTTAGSID" %in% names(yrke)) yrke[, UTTAGSID := as.character(UTTAGSID)]
if ("UTTAGSID" %in% names(yrke)) yrke[, DDBID := as.character(UTTAGSID)]

yrke[, YRKEBDAT := as.character(YRKEBDAT)]
yrke[, YRKESDAT := as.character(YRKESDAT)]
yrke[, YRKEBDAT := ifelse(substr(YRKEBDAT, 5, 8) == "0000",
                          paste0(substr(YRKEBDAT, 1, 4), "0101"), YRKEBDAT)]
yrke[, YRKESDAT := ifelse(substr(YRKESDAT, 5, 8) == "0000",
                          paste0(substr(YRKESDAT, 1, 4), "1231"), YRKESDAT)]
yrke[, YRKEBDAT := ifelse(substr(YRKEBDAT, 7, 8) == "00",
                          paste0(substr(YRKEBDAT, 1, 6), "01"), YRKEBDAT)]
yrke[, YRKESDAT := ifelse(substr(YRKESDAT, 7, 8) == "00",
                          paste0(substr(YRKESDAT, 1, 6), "30"), YRKESDAT)]
yrke[, YRKE_BDATE := suppressWarnings(anydate(YRKEBDAT))]
# setkey(yrke, UTTAGSID, YRKEBDAT)
setkey(yrke, DDBID, YRKEBDAT)

# fattiga <- yrke[HISCOSTATUS == 13, .SD[1], by = UTTAGSID]
fattiga <- yrke[HISCOSTATUS == 13, .SD[1], by = DDBID]

## make sure boende ID is character (again, safe if already set)
# boende[, UTTAGSID := as.character(UTTAGSID)]
# setkey(boende, UTTAGSID)
# setkey(fattiga, UTTAGSID)
boende[, UTTAGSID := as.character(DDBID)]
setkey(boende, DDBID)
setkey(fattiga, DDBID)

# boende <- fattiga[, .(UTTAGSID, HISCOSTATUS, YRKE_BDATE)][boende, on = "UTTAGSID"]
boende <- fattiga[, .(DDBID, HISCOSTATUS, YRKE_BDATE)][boende, on = "DDBID"]
```

## Lyten
```{r}
## ---------- ADD FIRST DISABILITY (lyten) NOTE ----------
lyten_med_institutioner <- fread("~/Arkiv/Data/U21008-Leverans/u21008_fil10_lyten.txt") # användes tidigare
lyten <- fread("/home/erling/gitstuff/POPUM_DDB/POPUM_lyte.csv")
## WORK!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! names(lyten)
## standardize id type here too
# if ("UTTAGSID" %in% names(lyten)) lyten[, UTTAGSID := as.character(UTTAGSID)]
if ("UTTAGSID" %in% names(lyten)) lyten[, DDBID := as.character(UTTAGSID)]

# lyten[, lytenBDAT := as.character(ANMNOBDAT)]
lyten[, lytenBDAT := as.character(LYTEBDAT)]
# lyten[, lytenSDAT := as.character(ANMNOSDAT)]
lyten[, lytenSDAT := as.character(LYTESDAT)]
lyten[, lytenBDAT := ifelse(substr(lytenBDAT, 5, 8) == "0000",
                            paste0(substr(lytenBDAT, 1, 4), "0101"), lytenBDAT)]
lyten[, lytenSDAT := ifelse(substr(lytenSDAT, 5, 8) == "0000",
                            paste0(substr(lytenSDAT, 1, 4), "1231"), lytenSDAT)]
lyten[, lytenBDAT := ifelse(substr(lytenBDAT, 7, 8) == "00",
                            paste0(substr(lytenBDAT, 1, 6), "01"), lytenBDAT)]
lyten[, lytenSDAT := ifelse(substr(lytenSDAT, 7, 8) == "00",
                            paste0(substr(lytenSDAT, 1, 6), "30"), lytenSDAT)]
lyten[, lyten_BDATE := suppressWarnings(anydate(lytenBDAT))]
# setkey(lyten, UTTAGSID, lytenBDAT)
setkey(lyten, DDBID, lytenBDAT)
# lytiga <- lyten[, .SD[1], by = UTTAGSID]
lytiga <- lyten[, .SD[1], by = DDBID]
```

```{r}
## Var bor de lytiga? Väldigt få i Sundsvallsregionen
lyttBoende <- merge(lytiga, boende[ , c("DDBID", "BOREGPREFIX")])
table(lyttBoende$BOREGPREFIX)

per_region_lytta <- unique(lyttBoende[!is.na(BOREGPREFIX), .(BOREGPREFIX, DDBID)]
  )[, .(n_individuals = .N), by = BOREGPREFIX][order(BOREGPREFIX)]

per_region_lytta[, total := sum(n_individuals)]
per_region_lytta 

per_region_boende <- unique(boende[!is.na(BOREGPREFIX), .(BOREGPREFIX, DDBID)]
  )[, .(n_individuals = .N), by = BOREGPREFIX][order(BOREGPREFIX)]

per_region_boende[, total := sum(n_individuals)]
per_region_boende 

bolytt <- merge(per_region_boende, per_region_lytta, by = "BOREGPREFIX")
bolytt <- bolytt[ , andelLytta := n_individuals.y/n_individuals.x]
bolytt
```

```{r}
## ensure char, key & join
# boende[, UTTAGSID := as.character(UTTAGSID)]
boende[, DDBID := as.character(DDBID)]
# setkey(boende, UTTAGSID)
# setkey(lytiga,  UTTAGSID)

lytiga[, DDBID := as.character(DDBID)]  # gör index columnen till charachter
setkey(boende, DDBID)
setkey(lytiga,  DDBID)

str(boende)
# boende <- lytiga[, .(UTTAGSID, lyten_BDATE)][boende, on = "UTTAGSID"]
boende <- lytiga[, .(DDBID, lyten_BDATE, LYTESTDNMN)][boende, on = "DDBID"]
```
```{r}
# När får individerna sina lytesnoteringar i repektive regioner
# c("DDBID","lyten_BDATE", "LYTESTDNMN", "BOREGPREFIX")
names(boende)

```
